title: aster patens var. patentissimus
intro:
Aster patens var. patentissimus is a variety of the American aster, a perennial plant native to eastern North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant is also known for its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and providing antioxidant properties. Aster patens var. patentissimus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and has also been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.

However, please note that Aster patens var. patentissimus may not be as widely studied as other plants, and its use should be approached with caution. 

If you need more information on Aster patens var. patentissimus, you may want to consider consulting a qualified healthcare professional or a reliable source on herbal medicine.
